decisions.what: Kept brand.ts content unchanged (already matched spec) but rewrote to confirm implementation
decisions.why: Spec required BRAND_ASSETS with horizontal/icon variants and Cloudinary f_auto,q_auto URLs, which the existing file already had verbatim

decisions.what: Created Logo component using next/image with onError fallback to text
decisions.why: Spec required variant (horizontal|icon), theme (orange|navy|white) props, Next.js Image optimization, error fallback to text, alt text, and className support

decisions.what: Used unoptimized prop on next/image for Cloudinary SVG logos
decisions.why: SVG assets benefit from Cloudinary's own transformations; avoiding Next image optimizer prevents transparency/rendering issues

decisions.what: Replaced all Image+BRAND_ASSETS usages of the logo with the new <Logo /> component across landing, sidebar, login, register, and forgot-password pages
decisions.why: Spec for each page required swapping inline Image references for the centralized Logo component to ensure brand consistency

decisions.what: Used icon variant in dashboard sidebar
decisions.why: Spec 004 explicitly requested <Logo variant='icon' theme='orange' /> for compact sidebar display
